content.main_text_preview: Important Alerts | Screen Reader | Skip to Main Content | A- A A+ Institute Portal MIS Login Web Mail Contact Us Student Portal (old) SHRI GOVINDRAM SEKSARIA INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY & SCIENCE, INDORE 'NAAC A GRADE' , An Autonomous Institute, established in 1952, run by Govt. of Madhya Pradesh Affiliated to Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya, Bhopal & Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya, Indore Home Notices Distinguished Alumni Award(DAA) & Young Alumni Award(YAA) (Deadline Extended till 31st Dec) Distinguished Alumni Award(DAA) & Young Alumni Award(YAA) (Deadline Extended till 31st Dec) || DEADLINE EXTENDED TILL 31st Dec,2025|| Dear Mr./Ms. .... Warm greetings from SGSITS Indore! We are delighted to share that SGSITS is instituting the DISTINGUISHED ALUMNI AWARD (DAA) and YOUNG ALUMNI AWARD (YAA) for the very first time, marking a significant milestone in celebrating the excellence and impact of our alumni community. The nominations portal for these prestigious awards is now open, and we invite your valuable perspective in helping us identify alumni who have made remarkable contributions at the national and global levels. Your nominations will play a pivotal role in shaping this inaugural recognition initiative. Below are the award category and criteria for selection: DAA, recognize accomplished alumni above the age of 45 as of Dec 22, 2025, who have demonstrated excellence across diverse fields such as Business, Academics, Research, Government, Public Service, and Entrepreneurship etc. Their achievements strengthen SGSITS’ legacy of excellence and inspire current and future generations and YAA awards recognize accomplished alumni under the age of 45 as of Dec 22, 2025, who are making significant contributions in Academics, Research, Corporate Leadership, Public Service, and Entrepreneurship etc. When submitting your nominations, please include comprehensive details about the nominee’s achievements and the impact they have created in their respective fields. Nominations submitted over the past three years will automatically be considered for review. To submit nominations for the DAA, please click here: DAA nomination Form : https://forms.gle/bZHvTC1qWhk3fosx5 To submit nominations for the YAA, please click here: YAA Nomination Form: https://forms.gle/FDdTRQJye9P3Mxd29 The deadline for submitting nominations is Dec 31 ,2025. The awardees will be announced on December 04, 2025, followed by a special felicitation ceremony during the Institute’s Foundation Day celebrations on 22 December 2025. Your active participation is vital in celebrating the remarkable achievements of our alumni community. By joining this effort, you help highlight the inspiring stories that continue to strengthen and elevate the legacy of SGSITS. With warm regards, Keshav Purv Chhatra Samanvya Mandal, SSS SGSITS, INDORE Explore SGSITS Campus Map Photo Gallery SGSITS Anthem Quick Findings TEQIP RTI Anti Ragging Committee & Squad SGSITS Grievance Redressal & Feedback AICTE Feedback for Students & Faculty ICC(Internal Complaint Committee) Institute Discipline Committtee Student Counsellor IPR Cell Important Links Digital Initiative by MHRD Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya Directorate of Technical Education All India Council for Technical Education University Grants Commission MPOnline CRISP INDIA Get In Touch Shri Govindram Seksaria Institute of Technology & Science Add: 23 Sir M.
